title: Interfaces, Dynamic Types, Errors, and API Boundaries · Execution Trace: Interface Values Nil
summary: A notification service must accept narrow capabilities, preserve error causes, and distinguish nil interfaces from typed nil values. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace interface dynamic type and value, nil interfaces, typed nil pointers, comparison, and method dispatch.
